# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-all
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Service
    name: default
  requiredAuthenticationRef:
    name: deny-all-authn
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  port: 0 # Matches all ports
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      linkerd-policy-default: deny
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: default-deny-all-sa
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  serverRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: default
  client:
    unauthenticated: true # Allows connections but policy will deny requests
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: deny-all-authn
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  networks: [] # No networks are allowed, effectively denying all.
